debug_info.goal:
C : CategoryInContext.Cat
⊢ @CategoryInContext.Functor.mk ⟨Opposite (Sigma.fst C), opp⟩.fst ⟨Opposite (Sigma.fst C), opp⟩.fst
      ⟨Opposite (Sigma.fst C), opp⟩.snd ⟨Opposite (Sigma.fst C), opp⟩.snd
      (@CategoryInContext.Functor.F (Sigma.fst C) (Sigma.fst C) (Sigma.snd C) (Sigma.snd C) (Category.id C))
      (fun {X Y} =>
        @CategoryInContext.Functor.homF (Sigma.fst C) (Sigma.fst C) (Sigma.snd C) (Sigma.snd C) (Category.id C) Y X)
      (fun X =>
        @CategoryInContext.Functor.map_id (Sigma.fst C) (Sigma.fst C) (Sigma.snd C) (Sigma.snd C) (Category.id C) X)
      ⋯ =
    Category.id ⟨Opposite (Sigma.fst C), opp⟩

rfl
  map_comp F G := by
    rfl

simp_all [Category.id]
    <;> simp_all [Map.map_id]
    <;> simp_all [IsEquiv]
    <;> simp_all [Inclusion]
    <;> simp_all [Equiv]
    <;> simp_all [Sub]
    <;> simp_all [Equiv.Sub]
    <;> simp_all [Equiv.toFun_eq]
    <;> simp_all [Equiv.invFun_eq]

rfl
  map_comp F G := by
    rfl

rw [h₆]
            _ = (1 * 1) * c := by
              simp_all [mul_assoc]
              <;>
              (try decide)
            _ = 1 * c := by
              simp_all [mul_assoc]
              <;>
              (try decide)
            _ = b := by
              rw [h₆]
              <;>
              simp_all [mul_assoc]
              <;>
              (try decide)
        simp_all [mul_assoc]
        <;>
        (try decide)
      _ = b := rfl
      _ = b := rfl
  have h_right : ∀ (a : A), a * 1 = a := by
    intro a
    have h₁ : ∃ b : A, a * 1 = 1 * b ∧ b = b * 1 := by
      specialize hX (a * 1)
      obtain ⟨b, hb₁, hb₂⟩ := hX
      refine' ⟨b, _⟩
      <;> simp_all [mul_assoc]
      <;>
      (try decide) <;>
      (try {
        have h₂ := left_inv b
        have h₃ := right_inv b
        simp_all [mul_assoc]
        <;>
        (try decide)
      }) <;>
      (try {
        have h₂ := right_inv b
        have h₃ := left_inv b
        simp_all [mul_assoc]
        <;>
        (try decide)
      })
    obtain ⟨b, hb₁, hb₂⟩ := h₁
    have h₂ : a * 1 = 1 * b := hb₁
    have h₃ : b = b * 1 := hb₂
    calc
      a * 1 = 1 * b := h₂
      _ = b := by
        have h₄ : 1 * b = b := by
          have h₅ := hX b
          obtain ⟨c, hc₁, hc₂⟩ := h₅
          have h₆ : b = 1 * c := by
            simp_all [mul_assoc]
            <;>
            (try decide) <;>
            (try {
              have h₇ := left_inv c
              have h₈ := right_inv c
              simp_all [mul_assoc]
              <;>
              (try decide)
            }) <;>
            (try {
              have h₇ := right_inv c
              have h₈ := left_inv c
              simp_all [mul_assoc]
              <;>
              (try decide)
            })
          calc
            1 * b = 1 * (1 * c) := by rw [h₆]
            _ = (1 * 1) * c := by
              simp_all [mul_assoc]
              <;>
              (try decide)
            _ = 1 * c := by
              simp_all [mul_assoc]
              <;>
              (try decide)
            _ = b := by
              rw [h₆]
              <;>
              simp_all [mul_assoc]
              <;>
              (try decide)
        simp_all [mul_assoc]
        <;>
        (try decide)
      _ = b := rfl
      _ = b := rfl
      _ = a := by
        have h₅ := h_left a
        have h₆ := h_right a
        simp_all [mul_assoc]
        <;>
        (try decide) <;>
        (try {
          have h₇ := left_inv a
          have h₈ := right_inv a
          simp_all [mul_assoc]
          <;>
          (try decide)
        }) <;>
        (try {
          have h₇ := right_inv a
          have h₈ := left_inv a
          simp_all [mul_assoc]
          <;>
          (try decide)
        })
  intro a b
  have h_left_a : 1 * a = a := h_left a
  have h_right_a : a * 1 = a := h_right a
  have h_left_b : 1 * b = b := h_left b
  have h_right_b : b * 1 = b := h_right b
  exact ⟨h_left_a, h_right_a⟩
